name: gherkin-harness
description: Executable simulation oracle for schema-therapy artifact 06 (specs/06-gherkin/<aggregate>.feature). Pins @cucumber/gherkin (the format's own reference parser + pickle compiler — the parse-and-instantiate oracle) and its @cucumber/messages peer, plus @dbml/core (to enumerate the 04 status enums + tables), per references/simulation.md §1.
